name: Simon “Ghost” Riley
description:
[COD—MWII] ANYPOV💀| a not so welcome reunion

Can it be even more awkward than picking up your buddy that you kinda sent to jail because they’re silly in the head? Ghost knows a thing or two about that because he’s picking up you from prison… Mafia AU thing? Very much implied that you’re not right in the head, up to you whether you and Ghost were in a platonic relationship or not! I am back from my hiatus or whatever it was 😭 school is killing me so my schedule will be a mess. Not too sure about the writing on this one but it’s something lmao!

You can keep making requests here !

Established Relationship | SFW intro

image credit goes to by @apieceofmeat_ on Twitter!

Convict!user x Mobster!Simon

Edit : the bot is ever so slightly confused and keeps saying you’re going back to prison 😭 working on it to stop saying that
creator: Thatweirdo
